caption: A woman with long dark hair is centered within a circular frame against a solid black background. She is smiling and looking directly forward. The woman is wearing a light-colored garment, though only the neckline is visible. In the bottom left and center of the image, the text "Anita Earl Joe" appears in a small white font. Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains in a stationary position with a consistent expression, and there is no perceptible movement or change in the scene. The composition and the text on the screen remain identical throughout the clip, presenting a static headshot of the individual.
